old_message1:
Hey team, here’s the quick rundown of the active Hack Club YSWs and how they stack up on pay‑per‑hour. I pulled the numbers straight from the JSON – no guessing, just the facts you need.

**What’s worth your time (sorted by dollars / hour)**  

1. **jackpot** – $6 / hour  
   • Status: active (ends 2026‑07‑07)  
   • IRL event: canceled (logistics & budget) – see proof in #ysws‑updates  
   • No extra notes on extensions or website.  

2. **example** – $6 / hour  
   • Status: active (ends 2026‑07‑07)  
   • IRL event: canceled (logistics & budget) – proof in #ysws‑updates  
   • Could be extended (reason: “trust me bro”).  

3. **flavortown** – dollars / hour: not available  
   • Status: active (ends 2026‑04‑30)  
   • Description: “Cook personal projects. Win free prizes.”  
   • Website: https://flavortown.hackclub.com/?ref=ysws-catalog  
   • Slack channel: #flavortown (https://hackclub.enterprise.slack.com/archives/C09MPB8NE8H)  
   • Economics: doohickeys → $0.20 (no dollar‑per‑hour figure).  

That’s it. Grab the ones that pay the most, or dive into flavortown if you’re after the cooking vibe. Let me know if you need deeper details!
